seo.homeDescription: We are your travel wholesaler. Leading tour operator for Travel Agencies.

landing.heroSubtitle: Leading tour operator for Travel Agencies
landing.service1Highlight: Hotel, transfer and car rental bookings
landing.service2Suffix: of the offering in each destination to provide agile and advantageous responses.
landing.service3Suffix: along with professional representation at the destination.
landing.bedBankBullet1Prefix: One of the leading bed banks in the market. We offer the ability to book at
landing.bedBankBullet2Prefix: Leaders in domestic and international destinations. Direct contracting of over
landing.bedBankBullet2Suffix: worldwide and much more through partners.
landing.bedBankBullet3: We also offer transfers, excursions and entrance tickets worldwide in just a couple of clicks.

forgotPassword.title: Recover password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you a verification code.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If the email exists in our system, you will receive a verification code shortly.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Error sending the code. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Enter the code received by email and your new password.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated successfully. You can now log in.
resetPassword.errorCodeInvalid: The code is invalid or has expired

register.successMessage: Your request is under review, we will contact you at the provided email.
